verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A broken vessel, Not fit for the master's use Was down there in the rubble, Buried in all my trouble But I cried out, Is there not A prophet in the land Who will go before Us to fight for Jerusalem? Then with one foot on land and The other one on the sea You came with shoutings of grace And revealed my true destiny.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So here I am Lord on my knees Asking for strength just one touch from thee I cannot sing your songs down there in Babylon So I'm gonna fight with sword in hand The Lord God of hosts is in command I'll not let you go Father, I'll fight till all my breeches are mended

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bride of Christ, I know sometimes You lose your battle cry But now in this cycle, Watch all your mountains crumble Mix the anointed word with faith, Apply the blood it's the only way Our gates must be fortified as We feast on bread and wine No more room for sin, Resisting power flows from within And we'll go marching with shoutings Of victory as we head to glory.
